title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — volume.kubernetes.io/selected-node
text:
Type: Annotation
Used on: PersistentVolumeClaim
This annotation is added to a PVC that is triggered by a scheduler to be
dynamically provisioned. Its value is the name of the selected node.

Type: Annotation
Used on: Node
If a node has the annotation
volumes.kubernetes.io/controller-managed-attach-detach
,
its storage attach and detach operations are being managed by the
volume attach/detach
controller
.
The value of the annotation isn't important.
